product.name: Men's Gray Muscle Shirt with Black Logo
product.description: Thanks to the relaxed fit and soft fabric this sleeveless tank has all the features to become a true crowd-favorite, especially when paired with a bright print of our logo on the chest. Enhance your casual everyday look, or your sports outfit.
